description:
## Goal

Author the hand-curated starter concept vocabulary that seeds the Stage 3 graph and bounds the LLM tagging pass.

## File Location

`concepts/taxonomy.toml`

## Structure

Concepts grouped by category (cosmology, soteriology, theology, praxis). Each concept has a stable ID and a one-sentence definition that is shown to the LLM during tagging.

```toml
[concepts.cosmology]
emanation_hierarchy = "A chain of divine beings or principles flowing from a single transcendent source"
demiurge = "A secondary creator deity, often ignorant or malevolent, responsible for the material world"
# ...

[concepts.soteriology]
gnosis_direct_knowledge = "Salvation through direct experiential knowledge of the divine, not faith or works"
# ...
```

## Source

Use the seed list in docs/guru-implementation.md §"Stage 3 Pass A". Expand only if a clearly-missing concept is needed for v1 coverage.

## Acceptance Criteria

- All concepts from the doc's Pass A example are present
- IDs are stable, snake_case, and unique
- Every concept has a precise one-sentence definition
